description: Default tag deletion profile for QuickCat batch cleaner. Customize for your institution.

notes.035: System control number (remove before importing to avoid ILS conflicts)
notes.049: Holdings information — local ILS will generate
notes.263: Projected publication date — remove after cataloging
notes.customize: Add institution-specific tags to delete_tags as needed
notes.org_code: Replace with your MARC organization code from https://www.loc.gov/marc/organizations/
